description: Composition Pink and purple flat knit pullover made of 100% acrylic, has ribbing around the neck with full raglan sleeves, V-neck, ribbed and striped design on the chest and hem and stripes on the cuffs Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours and cold water using mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry flat in shade Cool iron if required Perfect in style and comfort, this pink and purple striped pullover from jealous 21 makes a great casual wear. The flat knit gives this top a luxe feel, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and flats. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33
